headline: Arctos Announces Final Close of Arctos Keystone Partners Fund I at $6.2 Billion
summary: NEW YORK, July 07, 2026--Arctos, a business of KKR, today announced the final close of Arctos Keystone Partners Fund I ("Keystone Fund I" or the "Fund"), its inaugural fund dedicated to providing bespoke growth capital and financing to leading alternative asset managers.
